title: IOB Nest
description: HTTYD Dragon Nests is a Minecraft mod inspired by the world of How to Train Your Dragon, focused on immersive dragon nesting, exploration, and environmental storytelling. Players can discover naturally generated nests hidden across the world
body:
Explore the wild world of How to Train Your Dragon through immersive, naturally generated dragon nests scattered across your Minecraft world. HTTYD Dragon Nests adds handcrafted lairs, hidden dens, rare dragon eggs, and biome-specific structures inspired by iconic dragons such as the Night Fury, Monstrous Nightmare, Hideous Zippleback, and Skrill.

Each nest is designed around the dragon’s behavior and habitat, ranging from volcanic caverns and toxic jungle dens to frozen storm peaks and hidden obsidian caves. The mod focuses on atmospheric exploration, environmental storytelling, and rewarding discovery, making every nest encounter feel unique and memorable.

Every dragon has a nest that spawns in specific boimes such as:
Lightfury:Birch forest
Zippleback:Jungles
Skrill:Snowey plains 

And more

AA dragons planned for future
